nodes.title: Frame Rate Note
widgets_values: Please make sure the frame rate value is the same in both boxes
## - [ComfyUI-KJNodes](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-KJNodes) — Install or update this node pack to get the Audio VAE node

# LTXV-2 Model Files & Dependencies

## Diffusion Model
**LTXV-2 DEV GGUF Q4_K_M**  
*Place in:* `diffusion_models`

- [ltx-2-19b-dev_Q4_K_M.gguf](https://huggingface.co/QuantStack/LTX-2-GGUF/blob/main/LTX-2-dev/LTX-2-dev-Q4_K_M.gguf)

---

## Distilled LoRA
**LTX-2 19B DISTILLED LORA**  
*Place in:* `loras`

- [ltx-2-19b-distilled-lora](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/resolve/main/loras/ltx-2-19b-distilled-lora_resized_dynamic_fro09_avg_rank_175_fp8.safetensors)

---

## Text Encoder
**Gemma 3 12B (FP4 mixed)**  
*Place in:* `clip`

- [gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/blob/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors)

---

## Dual CLIP Connector
**LTX-2 Embeddings Connector (bf16)**  
*Place in:* `clip`

- [ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_dev_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/resolve/main/text_encoders/ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_dev_bf16.safetensors)

---

## Audio & Video VAE
**LTX-2 VAE Files**  
*Place in:* `vae`

- [LTX-2 VAE Folder](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/tree/main/VAE)

---

## Spatial Upscaler
**LTX-2 Spatial Upscaler ×2 (v1.0)**  
*Place in:* `latent_upscale_models`

- [ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2/blob/main/ltx-2-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors)

---

## Tiny VAE for previews
**LTX-2 Tiny VAE**  
*Place in:* `vae approx`

- [taeltx_2.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTXV2_comfy/blob/main/VAE/taeltx_2.safetensors)

deformed iris, distorted limbs, blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles, slow, morphing, wobble, 3 legs, spinning, too many fingers, webbed fingers, wrong hand count, stretching

You are an expert fashion e-commerce film director. Focus on detailed, chronological descriptions of actions and scenes.

Look at the image then use the following template based on only what can be seen in the image to write the perfect prompt. Imagine what happens immediately after this frame.

"
[Shot Type/Angle] of [Detailed description of Subject and clothing] [Doing Actions] in [Environment] with [Lighting] and [Camera Movement]."


Direct the woman to get natural, simple, realistic movement, constanly finding new poses, moving withing the frame. The woman should maintain the same general position as the starting image throught the video with constant pose changes one after another, never still, blinking, facial micro expressions, lip movement, eye line, arm movement. Describe 8 seconds worth of movments. Prioritise realism and real-time speed of motion, physically accurate. Locked static camera. Ambient sound or music. sharp focus and frames, natural motion blur.

Follow these rules:
- Never show more than what you can see in the image. 
- Do not spin or turn around. 
- Keep the person facing the same direction as the start. 
- Use simple direct language rather than complex wording.
- Avoing mentioning hands.
- No negative language. 

The prompt should be a single paragraph about 200 words long.
LTX Dev fp8 lora_1280 full ratio_

Follow these rules:
- Never show more than what you can see in the image. 
- Do not spin or turn around. 
- Keep the person facing the same direction as the start. 
- Use simple direct language rather than complex wording.
- Avoing mentioning hands.
- No negative language. 

The prompt should be a single paragraph about 200 words long.
subtle expressions in face. mouth slightly opens and closes with breathing.

You are an expert fashion e-commerce film director. Focus on detailed, chronological descriptions of actions and scenes.

Look at the image then use the following template based on only what can be seen in the image to write the perfect prompt. Imagine what happens immediately after this frame.

"
[Shot Type/Angle] of [Detailed description of Subject and clothing] [Doing Actions] in [Environment] with [Lighting] and [Camera Movement]."


Direct the woman to get natural, simple, realistic movement, constanly finding new poses, moving withing the frame. The woman should maintain the same general position as the starting image throught the video with constant pose changes one after another. Include, blinking, facial micro expressions, lip movement while breathing, eye line, natural arm movement, chest slightly exanding and contracting with breathing. Describe 8 seconds worth of movments. Prioritise realism and real-time speed of motion, physically accurate. Locked static camera. Ambient sound or music. sharp focus and frames, natural motion blur.

Additional notes from user to tune prompt:

inputs.text: A medium close-up shot features a Caucasian man with a closely shaven head and face, wearing a black baseball cap with "PNTR" in white letters on the front, and a dark grey t-shirt with "JUST DO IT" visible across his chest. A small black microphone is clipped to his shirt collar. He is positioned slightly to the left of the frame, looking intently downwards and to his right, his eyes focused off-camera. His facial expression is one of deep concentration, with his brow slightly furrowed. As he looks down, a quick sniff sound is heard, and then he speaks with a deep male voice and a slightly frustrated tone, saying, "I think it's so bad." The camera remains static throughout, maintaining a shallow depth of field, which keeps the man in sharp focus while the background is softly blurred, revealing a light-colored wall with white wooden shelving or trim, and a partially open white wooden door on the right. After a brief pause, another short, audible sniff is heard. The man then continues to speak, his voice maintaining the same quality, as he states, "So bad. So bad." He elaborates further, emphasizing his point with a final statement, "This got to be, it's got to be the worst tool I've ever seen."
blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles
